subcodes.first_line: Thy remembrance hath come before the All-Remembering One, and the Most Exalted Pen turneth toward thee from the precincts of the Prison, making mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی المذکور حاضر و قلم اعلی از شطر سجن بتو متوجه و ترا ذکر مینماید که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
